frame_analyses.description: The instruments are approaching the suture pad to begin the procedure.
The needle is being placed through the first mark on the suture pad.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture placement is slightly off-center from the mark.

frame_analyses.description: Suture is being pulled through after piercing the first mark.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Slight adjustment needed to align the suture better with the mark.

frame_analyses.description: The needle is being placed through the second mark on the suture pad.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Alignment with the mark is slightly off-center.

frame_analyses.description: The trainee is preparing to make the first throw of the surgeon's knot.
The third throw is being made, ensuring the knot is secure.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand switch is noticeable, following the protocol.

frame_analyses.description: Both ends of the suture are being cut to complete the procedure.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Careful cutting close to the knot.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: The slit in the Penrose drain is fully closed post procedure.

technique_summary: The trainee completed the task smoothly with minimal deviation and secure knot tying. Hand switches were executed correctly for each throw.
improvement_suggestions: Pay extra attention to aligning the suture with the marks to minimize deviation.
Increase the speed marginally to improve completion time.
strengths: Good knot security with proper tension applied.
